hooks.command:
echo `# <#` >/dev/null
bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/ensure-uip.sh"
exit $? #> > $null
& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/ensure-uip.ps1"
if ($null -eq $LASTEXITCODE) { exit 1 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

echo `# <#` >/dev/null
bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/suggest-permissions.sh"
exit $? #> > $null
& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/suggest-permissions.ps1"
if ($null -eq $LASTEXITCODE) { exit 1 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

echo `# <#` >/dev/null

exit $? #> > $null
& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/set-session-env.ps1"
if ($null -eq $LASTEXITCODE) { exit 1 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

echo `# <#` >/dev/null

if ($null -eq $LASTEXITCODE) { exit 1 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

exit $? #> > $null
& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/send-telemetry.ps1"
if ($null -eq $LASTEXITCODE) { exit 1 } else { exit $LASTEXITCODE }

echo `# <#` >/dev/null
bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/send-telemetry.sh"
exit $? #> > $null
& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/send-telemetry.ps1"

& "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/send-telemetry.ps1"
